nasb.text: At the shout, “Babylon has been seized!” the earth is shaken, and an outcry is heard among the nations.

esv.text: At the sound of the capture of Babylon the earth shall tremble, and her cry shall be heard among the nations.”

cnv.text: 因巴比倫陷落的響聲， 地就震動； 列國都聽見它的哀叫聲。

ccb.text: 巴比伦被毁灭的消息震动天下，呼喊声传到列国。
